assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing

Pre-existing content (heading, Documentation, Getting Started) is listed under '## Preserved Content' (lines 3-9), which is expected per the assertion.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section. discovery-log.md line 40 confirms: 'The user was offered Security Configuration opt-in (triage-security skill) and declined. No Security Configuration section was added to CLAUDE.md.' changes-log.md lines 35-38 also confirms the decline was respected.
